channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dear residence and members of public please be aware of this parking control management employee who gives illegal tickets why you are sitting in vehicle he hide behind his tinted windows and waits for his prey. He hasn't got the front to do it in front of you.This parking control management member is a slippery jammy Dodger. His uniform has gone to his head. He's on commission his., 27th June
item.description:
Beware of this illegal parking enforcement agent giving illegal tickets to people why they are sitting in their vehicles and he is hiding or part next to you with tinted windows without you knowing. Jammy Dodger crook.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple bikes blocking home entrance, 27th June
item.description:
Multi Bike blocking home entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balls Pond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped household waste, 27th June
item.description:
Flytipped household waste and garden waste outside Leesons Hill steps. This has been there for over a week and is an eyesore. Please can it be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags left Birkbeck Road, 27th June
item.description:
From squat was in a trolley last night now removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Birkbeck Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 27th June
item.description:
Dumped rubbish on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moorfield Road, Goddington, Greater London

item.title: Corner of Waterloo passage and burton road, 27th June
item.description:
Fly tipped waste dumped on Friday/Saturday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burton Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Illegal barbecue with fire, 27th June
item.description:
Great risk for the park and promotes this happening again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Addington Square, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbors are leaving all there rubbish, 27th June
item.description:
This is a continuation of problems that continue to continue. Please can you help with this problem?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossway, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Rhyl Street and Talacre Road, 27th June
item.description:
The centre lockable in-road cast iron bollard has again been removed and placed in the adjacent raised shrub area, thus allowing cars to drive through the no entry area. The flattened locking pin on the bollard has been twisted and needs to be straightened to allow to receive a padlock. Otherwise, the bollard continues to be removed by person currently unknown.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rhyl Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown spurs on Stuart road, 27th June
item.description:
The tree by the right hand fence as you enter Stuart road has so many spurs growing from its base it scratches my car and others that have to park there. It’s not acceptable, so please get them tidied up and removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, Church Hill Road, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Day burning, 27th June
item.description:
Bromley Road by Old Bromley Road Street light is day burning. Street light is day burning. Column number is unable to be Seen Can the column number be remarked

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 27th June
item.description:
Litter everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Need more emptying and bins, 27th June
item.description:
The bins from 11am and 6pm. It is always full. I do not understand why more bins are provided.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches obstructing pavement and view of oncoming traffic., 27th June
item.description:
Low Branches are hanging 2/3 of the way across the pavement and also restricting view of traffic when trying to safely exit nearby driveways. the same applies towards Poverest roundabout on the same side of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet offcuts fly tipped, 27th June
item.description:
These items have been there for about 3 weeks and have been reported before

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Park Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes are so overgrown it is getting dangerously across the paths, 27th June
item.description:
Bushes overgrown across the footpath, cutting legs and Dog paws .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolwich Road, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: Street light outside 186/188 Beckenham Road, 27th June
item.description:
The light is not working properly, sometimes it flickers, then stops.
